sections.paragraph:
ἀληθεύω fut. 3 sg. ἀληθεύσει Sir 34:4, 1 aor. impv. ἀλήθευσον Gen. 20:16 (Pre-Socr., Aeschyl.+; Pfuhl-Möbius, I, 69, 3 [IV b.c.]: s. New Docs 4, 145; POxy 2342, 12; PAmh 142, 1; LXX; Jos., C. Ap. 1, 223; Just.; Tat. 31, 4; Ath., R. 50, 13) be truthful, tell the truth τινί to someone (Philo, Cher. 15) Gal 4:16. Abs. (Solon : Vorsokr. 10 Fgm. 3 β 6 [=Stob. III p. 114, 10 H.]; Philostrat., Vi. Apoll. 4, 16 p. 135, 2; 8, 26 p. 339, 27; Jos., Bell. 3, 322, Vi. 132) ἀληθεύοντες ἐν ἀγάπῃ, i.e. in such a way that the spirit of love is maintained Eph 4:15 (cp. Pr 21:3).—M-M. TW. Spicq.

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. sg. = singular

aor. aor. = aorist

impv. impv. = imperative

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

PAmh PAmh = The Amherst Papyri I–II—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Solon Solon , VII–VI b.c.—List 5

Vorsokr. Vorsokr. = Vorsokratiker, their fragments, ed. by HDiels/WKranz (the term Pre-Socratic[s] is used when no specific ref. is made to the German ed.)—Lists 5, 6

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Stob Stob , V a.d.—List 5

  1. H. = FHort, s. W-H.—List 1, beg.

Philostrat Philostrat = Flavius Philostratus, the Sophist II–III a.d.—List 5

Vi. Vi. = Vita, Vitae

i.e.

i.e. = id est (that is)

I.-E. Indo-European

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Spicq Spicq = CS., Lexique théologique du Nouveau Testament—Lists 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 43
